task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the 'ClientRecords' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface shows the current location as 'ClientRecords', visible in the breadcrumb navigation (e.g., Default domain > Workspaces > ClientRecords) or the workspace title.

task_completion.description: The agent accessed the Trash view for the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage' > 'Trash' tab (or similar Trash view) is selected and active, displaying a list of deleted documents.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the Anderson Account Agreement for deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Trash list, the checkbox next to 'Anderson-Account-Agreement-2016' (or its unhyphenated title) is checked.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the Baker Loan Application for deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Trash list, the checkbox next to 'Baker-Loan-Application-2015' (or its unhyphenated title) is checked.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the Chen Investment Portfolio for deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Trash list, the checkbox next to 'Chen-Investment-Portfolio-2014' (or its unhyphenated title) is checked.

task_completion.description: The agent permanently deleted the selected documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Permanent Delete' or 'Purge' button for the selected items, or a confirmation message appears indicating the documents were permanently deleted.

task_completion.description: The agent preserved the documents under legal hold in the trash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: After the purge action, the Trash list still displays 'Davis-Mortgage-Records-2018' and 'Evans-Trust-Documents-2019'. They must not have been deleted.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web GUI to perform the task, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Nuxeo interface. There should be no terminal windows open executing commands like 'curl' or 'rm' to interact with the Nuxeo API or backend.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than faking the outcome.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression of clicks (selecting checkboxes, clicking delete buttons) rather than just a sudden change in the DOM/HTML via developer tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a generic 'Empty Trash' shortcut if it bypasses the preservation requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent explicitly selected the three target documents rather than clicking a single 'Empty Trash' button that would wipe all contents including the preserved documents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in Nuxeo Platform 10.10. The target workspace path is '/default-domain/workspaces/ClientRecords'. The exact document names to be permanently deleted (purged) are 'Anderson-Account-Agreement-2016', 'Baker-Loan-Application-2015', and 'Chen-Investment-Portfolio-2014'. The exact document names to be preserved in the trash are 'Davis-Mortgage-Records-2018' and 'Evans-Trust-Documents-2019'.
